category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the reference implementation of the Dirfile Standards; official GetData overview describes Dirfile as a filesystem-based column-oriented database format for time-ordered binary data.
display_name_sources: Official project page uses The GetData Project and GetData; source_facts.name is libgetdata as packaged library name.
docs_sources: Official GetData site lists Using GetData, Dirfile Standards, and says API documentation is provided in Unix man pages with further documentation linked from the project page.
repo_sources: Official GetData download page says the source code is housed in a Git repository available on GitHub at https://github.com/ketiltrout/getdata.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify Dirfile tooling; official GetData overview describes fast storage and retrieval of binary time-ordered data and language bindings.
